behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert very specific patterns not fully discoverable from instruction.md. For example, test_header_footer_guard_exists checks for exact pattern 'ItemsSource.IsHeader(position) || ItemsSource.IsFooter(position)' — the instruction never mentions ItemsSource, IsHeader, or IsFooter methods. test_guard_has_correct_comment checks for specific phrases like 'header index adjustment' and 'ArgumentOutOfRangeException' which are only partially mentioned. test_copilot_instructions_exists checks for ex

no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly states to 'add a guard that skips header and footer ViewHolders before they enter the selection-tracking system' and specifies exact comment content mentioning 'ArgumentOutOfRangeException'. It also dictates exact bash pattern elements (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U, head -1, LC_ALL=C sort) and exact section name ('Code Review Instructions'). This tells the agent WHAT to change rather than just describing what's broken.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_header_footer_guard_exists uses a strict regex pattern requiring exactly 'if (ItemsSource.IsHeader(position) || ItemsSource.IsFooter(position))'. An alternative correct fix that checks holder type (e.g., 'if (holder is HeaderViewHolder || holder is FooterViewHolder)') or uses a different API would fail. The test also requires the exact order (IsHeader before IsFooter) in the condition.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (test_header_footer_guard_exists, test_guard_has_correct_comment, test_nullable_rule, test_bash_pattern_safe) are all regex/string matching against file contents (re.search on file text). While test_adapter_compiles_with_fix and test_csharp_syntax_valid run dotnet build, the core behavioral tests just check text patterns, not actual runtime behavior of the fix.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests require specific code patterns (guard with IsHeader/IsFooter), specific comments, and specific copilot-instructions.md content that wouldn't exist in a stub or empty implementation. A pass/return stub wouldn't contain the required regex patterns.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction mentions header/footer guard, comment explaining the guard, Code Review Instructions section with dotnet format, #nullable enable rule with RS0017, and bash pattern with specific commands — all of which are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized with clear sections (Gates/pass_to_pass, fail_to_pass, regression/anti-stub), descriptive function names, and docstrings explaining each test's purpose.

structured_data_schema.reason: This task produces C# code and markdown files, not structured data like JSON/CSV/API/DB.

no_typos.reason: File paths, commands, and variable names in instruction.md and tests appear correct and consistent with the repository structure.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The instruction specifies the exact file to modify (SelectableItemsViewAdapter.cs), the exact nature of the fix (add a guard that skips header and footer ViewHolders), exact comment content requirements, and exact bash pattern elements. It also names the exact section heading '## Code Review Instructions' for the copilot-instructions.md file.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: The gold patch appends content to copilot-instructions.md and inserts a small guard block into the adapter file — both are localized changes, not full-file rewrites.
